:PROPERTIES:
:corpus-source:   Rector
:corpus-id:       R05
:corpus-severity: Important
:corpus-url:      https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-540-30202-5_5
:corpus-citation: Rector et al. (2004), "OWL Pizzas", EKAW 2004, sec. 7 (Primitive vs. Defined Classes); Rector, "Common Errors and Common Patterns", OWLED tutorial.
:corpus-expects:  planned/rector-primitive-vs-defined
:corpus-rationale: Author uses SubClassOf (primitive) where
 EquivalentTo (defined) was intended; the class then never
 classifies anything automatically because only necessary, not
 sufficient, conditions are stated.
:END:
#+title: Rector R05 -- primitive class where defined class was intended

* corpus-r05
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: corpus-r05
:ELOT-context-type: ontology
:ELOT-context-localname: corpus-r05
:ELOT-default-prefix: ex:
:header-args:omn: :tangle no
:END:
** Prefixes
:PROPERTIES:
:prefixdefs: yes
:END:
| prefix | uri                                   |
|--------+---------------------------------------|
| owl:   | http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#        |
| rdfs:  | http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema# |
| ex:    | http://example.org/corpus/r05/        |

** corpus-r05 ontology (ex:corpus-r05 ex:corpus-r05/0.0)
:PROPERTIES:
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
 - owl:versionInfo :: 0.0

** Classes
:PROPERTIES:
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
*** Cheese topping (ex:CheeseTopping)
 - rdfs:label :: "Cheese topping"@en
*** Cheesy pizza (ex:CheesyPizza)
 - rdfs:label :: "Cheesy pizza"@en
 - SubClassOf :: ex:hasTopping some ex:CheeseTopping

** Object properties
:PROPERTIES:
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
*** has topping (ex:hasTopping)
 - rdfs:label :: "has topping"@en
